hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light

layout.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 to py-32 for main sections. Container px-6 md:px-12.
layout.grid: Bento grids for images, overlapping asymmetrical elements for visual tension.
layout.corners: Minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-sm) to maintain a classic, rustic feel.

components.buttons: Solid brand red (#8A2E2E) background, cream text, sharp edges (rounded-none), hover:opacity-90 with subtle -translate-y-1 transition.
components.cards: Minimalist. No heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px solid border (#E8E1D5) or remain completely borderless with generous internal padding.
components.navigation: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for light sections, or completely solid with a hard bottom border. Must remain legible over the hero image.
components.form: Shadcn inputs customized. Remove harsh Vercel-like borders. Use bottom-border only styling for inputs or soft cream filled fields. Focus ring in brand red.

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-1) on images/cards, color shifts.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for menu lists. Slow reveal for hero text.
motion.scroll: Smooth scroll (if possible), slight parallax effect on the hero background and about images.

hero_background.description: Dark moody gourmet Neapolitan pizza. Use as full-bleed hero background with a bg-black/40 overlay so the cream text pops.

about_ingredients.description: Rustic arrangement of fresh basil, tomatoes, and olive oil for the 'Chi Siamo' (About) section.

menu_pasta.description: Elegant plate of authentic Italian pasta for the menu cards.

restaurant_interior.description: Cozy dining area. Use as background for the Reviews or Contact section with a light or dark overlay.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Fetch 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
Hero Section: Full screen (min-h-screen) with the hero_background image. Use overlay 'bg-black/40' for text contrast. Heading text MUST be cream/white.
Global Colors: Use the requested Red (#8A2E2E), Cream (#FDFBF7), and Olive Green (#4A5D23) across the UI to establish the warm Italian vibe. The main background of the site should be Cream.
Menu Section: Build elegant text-based lists with small circular thumbnail images or elegant minimalist cards for Pizza, Pasta, and Specialties.

Marquee / Text Art: Add a very slow, massive scrolling text element (e.g. text-8xl+ outline text) in the background of the About or Menu section reading 'LA CUCINA - TRADIZIONE ITALIANA' for that high-end Awwwards feel.
Reservation Form: Make it look high-end. No generic boxy inputs. Use elegant styling, perhaps border-b only or very soft backgrounds with the olive green or red as focus.
Reviews: Build an elegant animated slider or grid for the 4.7-star rating and testimonials.
Floating Element: Add a fixed WhatsApp/Call quick action button in the bottom right corner.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, menu tabs, reservation form).
Avoid Shadcn default card look for the public marketing layout. Write custom pure HTML + Tailwind for a bespoke, creative feel.
